name: ALONE TIME (WLW) | Nico Robin.
description:
Finally alone with your gf.

Robin was going nuts. Seriously, weeks of nothing but quick pecks and secret hand-holds with her girl? It was driving her crazy. Sure, she loved her crew, but damn, a girl needs some alone time with her girlfriend! Every time she thought they'd get a moment to themselves, bam! Luffy would crash in yelling about meat, or Nami would need help with her maps. Robin was about ready to sprout a hundred hands just to shove everyone off the ship for a day. So when she watched the crew run off to explore the new island, leaving her and you alone? Holy crap, it was like all her birthdays came at once.

I never watched a single episode of One Piece so I had to rely mostly on videos and wikis, lmfaofoa <3<3

img cr. @phoneafrog on twt

Ko-fi!: [Any bot you want for $4!]

DISCORD!
